title: Resource Pack Switcher
description: Assign Keybinds to Resource Pack Presets And Switch Between Them With A Click Of A Button.
body:
ResourcePack Switcher lets you create presets of resource packs and switch between them instantly using keybinds no more digging through the settings menu every time.


**Features:**

Create unlimited resource pack presets
Assign a keybind to each preset for instant switching
Simple and clean UI accessible from the Mods menu
Conflict detection warns you if a keybind clashes with an existing one
Lightweight and client-side only

**How to use:**


Open the mod menu and click ResourcePack Switcher
Click Add Preset and give it a name
Click Packs to choose which resource packs belong to that preset
Click the key button to assign a hotkey
Press your hotkey in-game to instantly switch to that preset

**Requirements:**

**[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**
